subcodes.title: Words to departing pilgrims spoken in June 1906
subcodes.first_line: Ye came and visited the Holy Place and associated with the Beloved of God. It is hoped ye will carry with you the effect and result
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @status of kings; future of monarchy, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @love and unity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @non-participation in politics
